summary: The code fails to resolve two persistent SAST findings across all attempts: CWE-22 path injection via insufficient filename sanitization (only blocks absolute paths and '..' but not traversal like '.../...//') and CWE-20 insecure XML parsing (ET.parse without disabling external entities). The fixer loop did not address these root causes.
suggested_actions: Replace the sanitize_filename function with a robust allowlist-based validation (e.g., only alphanumeric, underscores, hyphens) and use os.path.realpath to verify the resolved path is within uploads/.
Use xml.etree.ElementTree.XMLParser with resolve_entities=False and no DTD loading to prevent XXE and XML bombs.
Add MIME type checking and file size validation for uploads.
Ensure the POST handler properly parses multipart data (e.g., using cgi.FieldStorage or a standard library parser) instead of fragile string splits.
